channel.title: GitHub SystemVerilog Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of SystemVerilog in GitHub

item.title: lowRISC/opentitan
item.description: OpenTitan: Open source silicon root of trust

item.title: openhwgroup/cva6
item.description: The CORE-V CVA6 is an Application class 6-stage RISC-V CPU capable of booting Linux

item.title: pulp-platform/hwpe-stream
item.description: IPs for data-plane integration of Hardware Processing Engines (HWPEs) within a PULP system

item.title: pulp-platform/hwpe-ctrl
item.description: IPs for control-plane integration of Hardware Processing Engines (HWPEs) within a PULP system

item.title: lowRISC/ibex
item.description: Ibex is a small 32 bit RISC-V CPU core, previously known as zero-riscy.
